characters.name: Amanda
characters.description: AmandaBasic InformationStatusDeceasedAge19Date of birthc. 1989Place of birthUnited States of AmericaDate of death2008Cause of deathHeroin overdoseNationalityAmericanSexFemaleRoleKimberly Mills' friendMarital statusSinglePortrayalPlayed byKatie CassidyFilmTakenFirst appearanceTakenLast appearanceTaken 3 Amandawas a good friend ofKimberly Mills. Ultimately, Amanda's carelessness and promiscuity resulted in her and Kim to be targeted by traffickers of theAlbanian Mafiaduring a trip to Paris, causing them to be abducted and Amanda herself being killed. Kim asksBryan Millsfor permission to travel toPariswith her friend Amanda. Bryan balks at the two girls traveling alone, but relents when Lenore complains that he is overprotective. He gives Kim an international cellphone, and makes her promise to call every day. AtLos Angeles International Airport, he learns that the girls are not staying in Paris, but are following U2 during their European tour.

characters.name: Clarence
characters.description: ClarenceBasic InformationFull nameClarenceStatusDeceasedCause of deathShotKilled ByOleg MalankovProfessionBank AccountantMarital statusMarriedSpouseUnnamed wifeOther familyUnnamed dogPortrayalPlayed byAndrew Borba Clarence was a minor character in 2014 film,Taken 3. He was the bank accountant forStuart St. Johnwho had a unnamed wife and dog. Clarence  was seen getting a water bottle and then he gets confronted byMaximand another villain. Where Maxim forces Clarence to lie to his wife and tell he is going to take the dog for a walk.  Then Maxim puts Clarence into the car and they drive to  a bank where Stuart's money in. Clarence is then taken toOlegand forced Clarence to open the safe.   Then Oleg sees then the safe is empty and Oleg forces Clarence to get into the safe.  Then  Oleg calls Stuart and then shoots and kills Clarence to leave a message for Stuart.

characters.name: Gilles
characters.description: Gillesis aFrenchassociate ofBryan Mills. He was portrayed byChristophe Kourotchkine. Apparently Gilles and Bryan met when Bryan was still working for the CIA and the two became acquaintances. When Bryan goes to hunt for his missing daughter, Kim, who had been kidnapped by sex traffickers in Paris, Bryan rescues a girl who he thinks may have seen Kim from a brothel. He steals a car and goes to Gilles' hotel to rent a room. It is here that the audience is shown that the two are friends. Bryan gives the girl medicine and asks where she got his daughter's jacket. She is unable to help much except give himthe addresswhere she was taken.

characters.name: Sam Gilroy
characters.description: Sam GilroyBasic InformationStatusAliveAge46 (during third film)Date of birth1968Place of birthUnited States of AmericaNationalityAmericanResidence(s)Los Angeles, CaliforniaAffiliationCIAProfessionCIA AgentPortrayalPlayed byLeland OrserFilmsTaken,Taken 2,Taken 3First appearanceTakenLast appearanceTaken 3 Sam Gilroyis a retiredCIAoperative but still has connections. He is the best-friend ofBryan Millsand the godfather ofKimberly Mills. Bryan calls Sam to have him analyze a tape that Bryan recorded as his daughter was abducted. Sam tells Bryan and Lenore that the kidnappers are Albanians and how their specialty is kidnapping travelling girls for human trafficking. Sam also tells Bryan that he only has a ninety-six hour window to find Kim or he will never see her again.

characters.name: Horse
characters.description: Kim Millsis given aHorsefrom her stepfatherStuartfor her seventeenth birthday, upstaging her fatherBryan's gift of a karaoke machine.

characters.name: Marko Hoxha
characters.description: Marko HoxhaBasic InformationStatusDeceasedAge35Date of birthJanuary 29, 1973Place of birthTropojë,AlbaniaDate of death2008Cause of deathElectrocuted byBryan MillsNationalityAlbanianResidence(s)Paris,FranceAlias(es)Marko from TropojëAffiliationAlbanian MafiaProfessionMafia gangsterTerroristSex slaverFatherMuradSignificant other(s)Unknown brothersPortrayalPlayed byArben BajraktarajFilmsTakenFirst appearanceTakenLast appearanceTaken TerroristSex slaver Marko Hoxhais the main antagonist of the 2008 film,Taken, and the posthumous overarching antagonist in its 2012 sequel,Taken 2. He is a member of anAlbanian human trafficking ringwhich dedicates to kidnap foreign white women to sell them as sex slaves and prostitutes. When Marko kidnapsKimberly Mills, however, he unleashes the wrath of her fatherBryan, who sets himself to hunt down Marko and rescue his daughter. A ruthless sex slaver, Marko kidnaped foreign white women to sell them as prostitutes or sex slaves to make a profit. For him, women were objects and if they were virgins, that means they were valuable and were more money for him, even sending them to Patrice Saint-Clair so he could sell them to powerful men from the black market, who payed large sums for them. He held no regard on the life of others, as demonstrated when he drugged Amanda too much until he caused her to die from an overdose, but as usual, his victims meant nothing for him and Marko didn't care for it. When Bryan warned him to let go his daughter or otherwise he will track him down and kill him, rather than taking serious such threat, Marko mocked Bryan and sarcastically wished him good luck, showing that he believed himself as better than the others and was quite arrogant, not used to be threatened on his job. Marko also believed that he can control the law when he payed up corrupt French policemen with extortion money so he could continue to make profit for his business, like maintaining brothels. However, when interrogated, Marko was really a coward, as demonstrated when he wasn't able to tell Bryan where Saint-Clair sold his victims, leading Bryan to leave him to die a painful yet well-deserved death.

characters.name: Murad Hoxha
characters.description: Murad HoxhaBasic InformationStatusDeceasedAge66(at death)Date of birth27 July 1946Date of death2012Cause of deathImpaled byBryan MillsNationalityAlbanianAffiliationAlbanian MafiaProfessionMafia bossTerrorist leaderMarital statusUnknownChildrenMarko(son; deceased)Two unidentified sonsPortrayalPlayed byRade ŠerbedžijaFilmsTaken 2First appearanceTaken 2Last appearanceTaken 2 Terrorist leader Two unidentified sons Murad was naturally a cold, callous, calculating and amoral individual, being the head of the Albanian Mafia. While he did genuinely grieve for the loss of his sons and many of his men (as well as being sympathetic to their families), Murad was a certifiable hypocrite given his crimes. He chastised Bryan for the killing the traffickers and ruining their families' lives, while the Albanian Mafia had abducted, enslaved and murdered random women and girls from around the world, ruining both the their lives and the lives of the families they were taken from. For this, Murad seemed to either lack self-awareness for his hypocrisy, or simply refusing to acknowledge it as, being sex trafficker, he had to actively dehumanize and diminish his victims. Murad's dishonorable nature is made even more apparent when he tries to shoot Bryan in the back with a gun he left behind, despite being shown mercy and promising to end his vendetta against him, leading to his death.

characters.name: Henry Macon
characters.description: Henry Macon(nicknamed Mr. Nervous byIsabelle) is a crooked French police officer. He is only mentioned in thefirst filmand never seen. WhenBryan Millsgoes to Rue De Paradis he figures out that Mr. Macon had been transferred and nowJean-Claude Pitrelwill be collecting the bribes, the rate for which has just gone up. Bryan claims to be Jean-Claude and bargains with theAlbanian sex traffickersbefore revealing that he is not really who he claims, killing the Albanians and later torturing their leader,Marko, by means of electrocution for information on how his daughter was sold to a man namedSaint-Clair. Bryan turns the power back on and leaves Marko to die.

characters.name: Bryan Mills (Neeson)
characters.description: Bryan MillsBasic InformationNameBryan MillsStatusAliveAge68Date of birthJune 15, 1957Place of birthUnited States of AmericaNationalityAmericanSpeciesHumanResidence(s)Los Angeles, CaliforniaAlias(es)Jean-Claude PitrelMr. SmithNickname(s)BryAffiliationFormerly:Central Intelligence AgencyUnited States ArmyProfessionCentral Intelligence Agency:OperativeUnited States Army:Special Forces OperatorMotherSarah MillsSiblingsCali Mills(sister; deceased)Marital statusDivorcedSpouseEx-wife:Lenore MillsChildrenKimberly MillsOther familyUnnamed grandchildPortrayalPlayed byLiam NeesonFirst appearanceTakenLast appearanceTaken 3Appears in3 films Bryan Millsis a formerCIAoperative and the protagonist of theTakenfilm series. After becoming divorced due to the strain his career put on his marriage, he decided that family was more important to him than his job. He quit his job and decided to spend time more frequently with his ex-wifeLenore, and his daughterKim. Born in theUnited States of Americato Sarah Mills on June 15, 1957, Bryan Mills enlisted in the United States Army in 1979, then he was assigned to Special Forces in 1981. He was subsequently employed in the CIA and worked as a "preventer" as he called it. His actual position in the CIA was a paramilitary operations officer or specialized skills officer. In his adulthood, he also married Lenore, and sired Kimberly Mills with her. Due to the strain on his marriage due to him being away so often, Lenore eventually divorced Bryan, who would later marry a man namedStuart St. John. As a result of the strain that his career put on his family life, Bryan decided that he missed his family more than his career, so he retired from his government services.

characters.name: Kimberly Mills
characters.description: Kimberly MillsBasic InformationFull nameKimberly MillsStatusAliveAge32Date of birthMay 17, 1991Place of birthUnited States of AmericaNationalityAmericanSexFemaleResidence(s)Los Angeles, CaliforniaNickname(s)KimFatherBryan MillsMotherLenore Mills(deceased)Children1Other familyCalis Mills (aunt: deceased)PortrayalPlayed byMaggie GraceFilmsTaken,Taken 2,Taken 3First appearanceTakenLast appearanceTaken 3 Kimberly "Kim" Millsis the daughter ofBryan MillsandLenore Millsand the deuteragonist of theTakenfilm series. Kim's kidnapping at the hands of sex-traffickers is the catalyst the events of 2008. In 2008, after Kim and her friendAmandagot off the plane and left the airport inParis, Amanda took a picture of Kim. A French man calledPeterasked them if they wanted him to take a picture of both of them and they said yes. After Peter takes the picture he asks them if they'd like to get a taxi with him and again they say yes. Kim and Amanda show Peter where they are staying and Peter asks if they'd like to go to a party which they also say yes to. Once the girls are inside, Peter makes a phone call in French then walks off.

characters.name: Gregor Milocivic
characters.description: Gregor Milocivicis an Albanian translator inTaken. He was portrayed byGoran Kostic. He meetsBryan Mills(under the alias Mr. Smith) in his car, having been contacted to translate Albanian. He gives Bryan his resume and tells that he fled Albania after a civil war erupted. Bryan then pays him for three hours of his services and then translates the Albanian spoken through a radio heard by a bug he earlier planted. He tells that they are insulting him then talking about football and finally talking about "fresh merchandise" giving them trouble at a brothel. Bryan then lets Gregor out, asking for an Albanian to English dictionary. Gregor gives it to him and Bryan follows one of the terrorists to the brothel at the construction site.
